items.title: Notice: UK ETS Allocation Table for operators of installations
items.summary: This table contains a list of each installation’s free allocation for the 2021 to 2026 allocation period.

items.title: Oil and gas: environmental submissions and determinations
items.summary: Interested parties can review records of applications and statements submitted to OPRED as required by environmental regulations.

items.title: Official Statistics: Trade and investment core statistics book
items.summary: A monthly snapshot of the UK’s trade and investment position, summarising trade statistics produced by ONS, HMRC, DBT and others.

items.title: Guidance: UK Defence and Security Exports event and exhibition support
items.summary: Information on which domestic and international events we will be at during 2026 and 2027, and guidance on how we can support businesses to participate.

items.title: Official Statistics: UK trade in numbers
items.summary: A snapshot of the UK’s latest trade and investment position, summarising statistics produced by ONS, DBT, and UNCTAD.

items.title: Notice: Notice to exporters 2026/12: exports to sanctioned destinations
items.summary: The Export Control Joint Unit (ECJU) has changed the team responsible for trade sanctions licensing responsibilities.

items.title: Official Statistics: Social Housing Decarbonisation Fund: February 2026
items.summary: Data to monitor the installation of energy efficiency measures in domestic properties via the Social Housing Decarbonisation Fund (SHDF) scheme in England.

items.title: Official Statistics: Boiler Upgrade Scheme: March 2026
items.summary: Data monitoring the uptake of low carbon technologies on the Boiler Upgrade Scheme (BUS), including the installation of air source heat pumps, ground source heat pumps and biomass boilers.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Solar PV deployment: March 2026
items.summary: Monthly deployment of solar photovoltaic capacity in the United Kingdom.

items.title: Official Statistics: Great British Insulation Scheme release: April 2026
items.summary: Data to monitor the installation of energy efficiency measures in domestic properties via the Great British Insulation Scheme (GBIS).

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Household Energy Efficiency Headline Release (monthly data)
items.summary: Headline Household Energy Efficiency statistics under the Energy Company Obligation (ECO) and the Green Deal Framework.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Road fuel prices: 20 April 2026
items.summary: Weekly prices of unleaded petrol and diesel.

items.title: Official Statistics: Strategic export controls: licensing statistics: 1 October to 31 December 2025
items.summary: This statistics release will provide data about decisions made on licence applications to the Export Control Joint Unit (ECJU) of the Department for Business and Trade (DBT) for 1 October to 31 December 2025 (2025 Q4). From the 2024 Q1 publication until further notice, these statistics have been reclassified and published as Official Statistics in Development.

items.title: British Industrial Competitiveness Scheme: consultation on scheme eligibility and approach
items.summary: We are seeking views on the proposed approach to the new British Industrial Competitiveness Scheme (BICS) and how eligible businesses should be selected.

items.title: Correspondence: Connections Reform: delivery update and battery capacity
items.summary: Joint update from DESNZ and Ofgem on connections reform delivery and the level of battery storage capacity in the reformed queue.

items.title: Government cuts electricity bill for 10,000 manufacturers in boost for UK competitiveness
items.summary: The Government has announced that electricity bills will be cut by up to 25% for over 10,000 businesses through the British Industrial Competitiveness Scheme.

items.title: British Industrial Competitiveness Scheme: consultation on regulatory changes and scheme delivery
items.summary: This consultation seeks views on the proposed regulatory changes and approach to scheme delivery for the new British Industrial Competitiveness Scheme (BICS).

items.title: Correspondence: Letter from the Secretary of State for Business and Trade to the Business and Trade Committee: 2 April 2026
items.summary: Letter from the Rt Hon Peter Kyle MP, the Secretary of State for Business and Trade, to the Rt Hon Liam Byrne MP, Chair of the Business and Trade Committee.

items.title: Transparency data: Small modular reactor: summary programme business case
items.summary: This is a summary of the programme business case produced for the small modular reactor (SMR) programme.

items.title: Official Statistics: Preference utilisation of UK trade in goods, 2024
items.summary: This statistics release will provide data and analysis of the extent to which UK goods imports and exports utilised tariff preferences under preferential trade agreements (PTAs) in 2024, including the EU-UK Trade and Cooperation Agreement (TCA), and the Developing Countries Trading Scheme (DCTS).

items.title: Transparency data: Post Office Capture financial redress data for 2026
items.summary: Data for 2026 on redress for postmasters impacted by the Post Office Capture software.

items.title: Transparency data: Post Office Horizon financial redress and legal costs data for 2026
items.summary: Data for 2026 on redress for postmasters impacted by the Post Office Horizon scandal.

items.title: Next generation empowered through Technical Excellence Colleges
items.summary: 19 new Technical Excellence Colleges will equip young people with the high-level technical skills needed to access well-paid, high-skilled jobs.

items.title: Policy paper: Retrofit System Reform Advisory Panel: terms of reference
items.summary: An expert panel on home retrofit system reform.

items.title: Policy paper: Implementing the Plan to Make Work Pay and Employment Rights Act
items.summary: The updated implementation timeline for the government’s Plan to Make Work Pay and the Employment Rights Act 2025.

items.title: Notice: Notice to exporters 2026/11: expiry date for F680s on SPIRE
items.summary: The Export Control Joint Unit (ECJU)  is transitioning the Ministry of Defence (MOD) security approval form 680 (F680) away from SPIRE.

items.title: Victims of workplace abuse will no longer be silenced
items.summary: Consultation on new rules to stop employers using NDAs to cover up workplace abuse

items.title: Make Work Pay: misuse of non-disclosure agreements (NDAs)
items.summary: We are seeking views on proposals to prevent the misuse of non-disclosure agreements in cases of workplace harassment and discrimination.

items.title: Guidance: Network Transformation Programme investigation: privacy notice
items.summary: How the Department for Business and Trade will process personal data for the Network Transformation Programme investigation.

items.title: Guidance: Network Transformation Programme investigation: terms of reference
items.summary: The Department for Business and Trade has commissioned an independent investigation into Post Office Limited’s 2010 to 2019 Network Transformation Programme.

items.title: Guidance: Taking part in the UK Emissions Trading Scheme markets
items.summary: This guidance explains the operation of the UK ETS markets and how to take part in auctions and in trading on the secondary market.

items.title: Guidance: Contracts for Difference (CfD) Allocation Round 7: Subsidy Control Transparency Database estimates
items.summary: Information on the estimates used for the subsidy amount for Contracts for Difference Allocation Round 7 on the Subsidy Control Transparency Database.

items.title: Official Statistics: Trade and investment factsheets: latest update
items.summary: The most up to date snapshot of the UK’s trade and investment positions with trading partners overseas.

items.title: UK centre to lead the world in fusion diagnostics
items.summary: UKAEA launches Diagnostics Innovation Centre of Excellence (DICE) to strengthen UK's position as a world leader in fusion diagnostics.

items.title: Cumbrian collaboration expands robotics training into new era
items.summary: UKAEA and National College for Nuclear and Clean Energy launch CROSS (Cumbria Robotics Operations Skills Centre) to build UK’s robotics-enabled workforce.

items.title: Global fusion sector scaling up, creating UK SME opportunities
items.summary: UKAEA launches Global Fusion Guide for SMEs, helping businesses with clear, practical steps to collaborate with, and supply, fusion developers worldwide.

items.title: UKAEA unveils 2026-2030 fusion roadmap
items.summary: UK’s national fusion laboratory charts a clear mission and targets progress towards fusion energy and generating economic benefits for the UK.

items.title: Accredited official statistics: Weekly road fuel prices
items.summary: Road fuel price statistics providing average UK retail 'pump' prices on a weekly basis.

items.title: Official Statistics: Road fuel sales, deliveries and stock levels: 28 June 2026
items.summary: Official statistics in development on average road fuel sales, deliveries and stock levels at sampled filling stations in the United Kingdom from 27 January 2020 to 28 June 2026.

items.title: Policy paper: UK Atomic Energy Authority strategy 2026 to 2030
items.summary: The strategy sets out how UKAEA will deliver foundational research, technology and innovation to support the UK fusion sector through world-leading expertise.
